mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORKRECORD ( user_id, course_id, battle_id, workrecord_date, distance, max_speed, avg_speed, max_heartrate, avg_heartrate, avg_pace, avg_cadence, calorie ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{battleId}, CURRENT_DATE(), #{distance}, #{maxSpeed}, #{avgSpeed}, #{maxHeartrate}, #{avgHeartrate}, #{avgPace}, #{cadence}, #{calorie} )
mapper.select: SELECT workrecord_id, user_id, course_id, battle_id, is_measure, workrecord_date, distance, max_speed, avg_speed, max_heartrate, avg_heartrate, max_pace, avg_pace, avg_cadence, calorie FROM WORKRECORD WHERE workrecord_id = #{workRecordId}

SELECT workrecord_id, user_id, nickname, course_name, battle_name, workrecord_date, distance, max_speed, avg_speed, max_heartrate, avg_heartrate, max_pace, avg_pace, avg_cadence, calorie FROM WORKRECORD_VIEW WHERE workrecord_id = #{workRecordId}

SELECT workrecord_id, user_id, course_id, battle_id, is_measure, workrecord_date, distance, max_speed, avg_speed, max_heartrate, avg_heartrate, max_pace, avg_pace, avg_cadence, calorie FROM WORKRECORD WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_measure = 1 AND workrecord_date = CURDATE() ORDER BY workrecord_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT workrecord_id, user_id, course_id, battle_id, is_measure, workrecord_date, distance, max_speed, avg_speed, max_heartrate, avg_heartrate, max_pace, avg_pace, avg_cadence, calorie FROM WORKRECORD WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND is_measure = 1 AND workrecord_date = CURDATE() ORDER BY workrecord_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT workrecord_id, user_id, course_id, battle_id, is_measure, workrecord_date, distance, max_speed, avg_speed, max_heartrate, avg_heartrate, max_pace, avg_pace, avg_cadence, calorie FROM WORKRECORD WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND workrecord_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY workrecord_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE WORKRECORD SET user_id = #{userId}, course_id = #{courseId}, battle_id = #{battleId}, is_measure = #{measure}, workrecord_date = #{workRecordDate}, distance = #{distance}, max_speed = #{maxSpeed}, avg_speed = #{avgSpeed}, max_heartrate = #{maxHeartrate}, avg_heartrate = #{avgHeartrate}, avg_pace = #{avgPace}, avg_cadence = #{cadence}, calorie = #{calorie} WHERE workrecord_id = #{workRecordId}
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(workrecord_date, '%x-%v') AS week_key, -- ISO Week Key MIN(workrecord_date) AS start_date, MAX(workrecord_date) AS end_date FROM WORKRECORD WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY week_key ORDER BY start_date DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(workrecord_date, '%Y-%m') AS month_key FROM WORKRECORD WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY month_key ORDER BY month_key DESC
SELECT YEAR(workrecord_date) AS year_key FROM WORKRECORD WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY year_key ORDER BY year_key DESC

SELECT workrecord_id, user_id, course_id, battle_id, is_measure, workrecord_date, distance, max_speed, avg_speed, max_heartrate, avg_heartrate, max_pace, avg_pace, avg_cadence, calorie FROM WORKRECORD WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY workrecord_date DESC
SELECT workrecord_id FROM WORKRECORD WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_measure = 1 AND course_id IS NULL AND battle_id IS NULL AND workrecord_date = CURDATE() ORDER BY workrecord_id DESC LIMIT 1
